calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-04-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar May-06-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

David M. Simonini, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Brendon Miller, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Walter Danridge.
Default was entered against defendant on August 7, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on March 12, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Brendon Miller, and against the Defaulted Defendant Walter Danridge as follows:

Damages/Principal - $74,000.00.
Costs - $515.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $74,515.00.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
